hero.title: Healthcare Complaint Platform
hero.subtitle: Submit complaints against hospitals, doctors, and health insurance funds. Your complaint is forwarded to the relevant institution and the Ombudsman.

step1.title: Submit
step1.desc: Fill in the complaint form with details about the healthcare provider.

step2.title: Review
step2.desc: Anonymous complaints are reviewed by an administrator before forwarding.

step3.title: Forward
step3.desc: Your complaint is sent to the institution and a copy to the Ombudsman.

about.title: About Vallentin Claims
about.p1: Vallentin Claims is a web-based platform that allows citizens to submit complaints against healthcare institutions — hospitals, doctors, and health insurance funds.
about.p2: Complaints submitted by registered users are forwarded immediately to the relevant institution and a copy is sent to the Ombudsman. Anonymous submissions are reviewed by an administrator first.
about.p3: The platform is designed with privacy and security in mind. Personal data is handled in accordance with GDPR.
about.contactText: For questions or assistance, please reach out via the complaint tracking system.

section1.title: Data we collect
section1.body: We collect your email address and name when you register. For complaint submissions, we may collect contact details you provide voluntarily. We also retain your IP address for abuse prevention.

section2.title: How we use your data
section2.body: Your data is used to process your complaint, notify you of its status, and forward it to the relevant institution. We do not sell your personal data.

section3.title: Your rights (GDPR)
section3.body: You have the right to access, rectify, or erase your personal data. Contact an administrator to exercise these rights.

section4.title: Data retention
section4.body: Complaint records are retained for a minimum period required by law. Account data may be erased on request, subject to legal obligations.

section1.title: Acceptable use
section1.body: You may use this platform to submit genuine complaints related to healthcare services. You must not submit false, abusive, or spam content.

section2.title: Account responsibility
section2.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

section3.title: Disclaimer
section3.body: This platform facilitates routing of complaints. We do not guarantee any particular outcome. Institutional responses depend on the respective institution.

section4.title: Modification
section4.body: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use after an update constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

track.title: Track a complaint
track.notFound: Complaint not found or you do not have access. Sign in to track your submissions.

admin.anonymizeConfirmBody: This will permanently replace all personal data for {{email}} with anonymous placeholders. Complaint records will be retained. This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteInstitutionBody: Deactivate {{name}}? It will no longer appear in dropdowns.

dropzone.hint: Drag and drop or click to upload. Max {{max}} files, {{size}} total.
